theme.description: A high-contrast, futuristic dark-tech aesthetic inspired by cyberpunk HUDs and precision instruments. Uses deep void backgrounds, neon accents, and glassmorphism.

layout.grid_system: Use CSS Grid with 'Bento' style asymmetry. Avoid perfect symmetry.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10, 15, 24, 0.8) 0%, rgba(10, 15, 24, 0.6) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
visual_enhancers.scanlines: background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.05) 3px); background-size: 100% 4px;
visual_enhancers.border_glow: border: 1px solid var(--color-primary); box-shadow: inset 0 0 10px rgba(0, 242, 255, 0.2);

buttons.primary: Chamfered corners (clip-path), neon border, glowing hover state, uppercase text.
buttons.secondary: Ghost style, transparent background, white border, subtle hover glow.
buttons.danger: Red neon border, red text, glitch effect on hover.

cards.dashboard: Glassmorphism background, thin border, inner glow on active state.
cards.parking_slot: Rectangular, color-coded border (Green/Red), clear status indicator, holographic number.

inputs.style: Transparent background, bottom border only (terminal style) OR full border with neon focus state. Monospace font for data entry.

modals.style: High blur backdrop, sharp corners, heavy border glow.

image_urls.success_checkmark: Use a green neon circle with a checkmark icon (Lucide React).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SYSTEM DETECTED REACT: The file structure at /app/frontend/ uses React + Tailwind. IGNORE the 'pure HTML/Jinja2' constraint in the prompt as it conflicts with the environment. Build using React + Tailwind.
2. TAILWIND CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors defined in 'colors' section. Extend the theme, do not overwrite completely.
3. FONTS: Import 'Rajdhani' (400, 500, 700) and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.css.
4. GLOBAL STYLES: In index.css, apply the 'void' background color to the body and set text color to 'text-primary'.
5. COMPONENTS: Build reusable 'CyberCard', 'NeonButton', and 'StatusBadge' components that implement the visual enhancers defined above.
6. ANIMATION: Use Framer Motion for page transitions and micro-interactions (hover glows, slot status changes).
7. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento' grid strategy for the Landing Page. Use a high-density grid for the Parking Dashboard.
8. PRESERVE BACKEND: Do not modify /app/backend/ logic unless necessary for API integration. Ensure all API calls match the existing backend endpoints.
9. DATA-TESTID: Every interactive element (button, input, link) MUST have a unique data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn').
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
